scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const src='static_build/.vite/manifest.json'; if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,'static_build/manifest.json'); fs.mkdirSync('staticfiles',{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync(src,'staticfiles/manifest.json'); console.log('manifest.json copied to static_build/ and staticfiles/');}else{console.error('ERROR: '+src+' not found');process.exit(1);}"
